title: How can you have an eco-friendly Christmas?
content:
How can you do your bit for the planet this Christmas?

In the UK more than 100 million bags of rubbish get sent to landfill each Christmas.

It is safe to say consumerism and Christmas traditionally go hand in hand with gift-giving and festive meals, but it does not have to.

BBC's Charlie Buckland explains her top five ways to be eco-friendly.

Filmed and edited by Erin Lister.

Abigail and Marcus Beck live in a eco home which relies on renewable energy, which means no gas power in the winter months

Hugo, originally from Cardiff, works as a barrister and was banished on the third episode of the Traitors.

Miles Cross admitted sending a fatal chemical to four people between August and September 2024.

Miles Cross admitted four counts of intentionally committing an act capable of encouraging or assisting suicide.

Snow and ice warnings are currently in place across Wales, bringing widespread travel disruption.

Samantha Williams speaks out over the late diagnosis of her baby son's rare condition, SMA.

Jonathan Carley appears in court accused of wearing high-ranking officer uniform without permission.

After a New Year's Eve swim at Langland Bay in Swansea in 2023, Dan Richards' life changed forever.

Emma Giannuzzi used sunbeds throughout her late teens and was twice diagnosed with melanoma.

Dr Bernadette Hard describes the symptoms of the rare "brain sag" condition she suffered.

British people are taking the plunge in search of better weather, a superior work-life balance and better pay.

Rob and Dianne Parsons raised their two children with Ronnie by their side.

The first cargo of coal on the Brecon Canal reached the Brecon Basin on Christmas Eve 1800.

Hundreds took part in a series of lantern parades to mark 225 years since the canal's first cargo journey.

TV weather presenter Ruth Dodsworth revealed that she used to "dread" Christmas Day with her abusive ex-husband.

Meg Jones won the Rugby World Cup but missing her parents who both died in recent months.

Christopher Mills describes how he found out about the plot to kill him, by his wife and her lover.

About 17,000 over 65s in Wales won't have anyone to exchange cards or presents with this Christmas.

Dog walker and TikToker Denni Welsh shares tips for keeping dogs calm this Christmas.

Madelaine Thomas set up the business after clients repeatedly leaked her private explicit images.
